skills.name: react-best-practices
skills.useWhen: React components, hooks, TanStack Query, bundle size, rendering performance, data fetching, or performance-sensitive UI changes.
skills.notes: Use as a React performance and code-quality guardrail. Asterism contracts still take precedence over external guidance.

skills.name: composition-patterns
skills.useWhen: Reusable component APIs, packages/ui work, provider/context design, compound components, or component refactors.
skills.notes: Use to avoid boolean-prop proliferation and keep shared UI APIs composable.

skills.name: vercel-cli-with-tokens
skills.useWhen: Vercel CLI operations with VERCEL_TOKEN, project linking, environment variables, deployment inspection, or domain management.
skills.notes: Use for non-interactive/token-based Vercel workflows. Never put tokens in command arguments or committed files.

skills.name: deploy-to-vercel
skills.useWhen: Preview or production Vercel deployments, project linking for deployment, or retrieving deployment URLs.
skills.notes: Default to preview deployments unless the user explicitly asks for production.

skills.name: vercel-optimize
skills.useWhen: Post-deployment Vercel cost, Core Web Vitals, usage, metrics, caching, or route-performance audits.
skills.notes: Use only after the app is deployed and has Vercel metrics. For Vite SPA, treat output as limited platform guidance unless the skill confirms stronger support.
